title: Extraction of rhodium(III) from malonate media using 4-(4-ethylbenzylideneimino )-5-methyl-4H-1 ,2,4-triazole-3-thiol (EBIMT)
author: Uzma Parveen K. Shaikh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Dr. B. A. M. University, Aurangabad-431 004, Maharashtra, India 

  E-mail  : abr_chem@yahoo.co.in Fax : 91-240-2403335 

 Millind College of Science, Nagsenvan, Aurangabad, 

  Maharashtra, India Manuscript received online 21 February 2012, revised 27 March 2012, accepted 30 March 2012  

 Extraction of rhodium(lll) with 4-(4-ethylbenzylideneimino)-5-methyi-4H-1,2,4-triazole-3-thiol (EBIMTT) from malonate media is described. Extraction was found quantitative with 0.1  M  EBIMTT in chloroform in the pH range 1- 2. From organic phase of EBIMTT, rhodium(lll) was stripped out with 1  M  HCI and determined spectrophotometrically with standard stannous chloride method. Effect of various parameters such as reagent concentration, equilibration period, effect of various diluents and divers ions on the extraction of rhodium(lll) was also studied. The method affords binary separation of rhodium(III) from iron(III), cobalt(II), nickei(II) and copper(II), and is applicable to the analysis of synthetic mixtures, alloys and spent catalysts. The method is fast, accurate and precise.
